name: TC4 original GUI, revealer and wand visual parity cleanup
changes: Bumped build.gradle and mods.toml to 4.62.0 while preserving Stage423-442 compatibility markers.
Tightened IRevealer parity: goggles/helmet reveal only from head slot; Thaumometer reveals only from hand. Holding goggles no longer acts as a fake revealer shortcut.
Kept Aura Node HUD sampling on original hud.png, node_bubble.png and full 64px cells of nodes.png through named 256/64/2048 constants to prevent future atlas crop drift.
Added Stage443 coordinate ledger to Research Table screen for original GuiResearchTable aspect grid, combine slots, page arrows and copy icon positions.
Arcane Workbench GUI now renders primal aspect costs from the visible shaped grid first, falling back to output lookup only for preview desync. Crafting logic stays server-side and unchanged.
Added strict audit coverage for original GUI assets, Thaumometer scanner.obj/scanner.png, Goggles model texture, wand model texture and Aura Node atlas resources.
Added renderer guard markers for Thaumometer transform adapter, Goggles original model texture layer and Wand original model texture renderer.
explicit_non_goals: No new items, recipes, GUI pages, research entries, progression or mechanics were added.
No fake focus effects were added.
No Infusion Matrix recipe list expansion was performed in this visual/runtime cleanup batch.
remaining_non_parity_known_areas: Research Table still needs pixel-level verification against original mouse hitboxes, page animation and tooltip behavior.
Arcane Workbench still needs deeper slot and wand-charge visual parity beyond GUI texture and primal cost placement.
Thaumometer uses numeric scanner.obj renderer but still needs a full transform comparison against original RenderItemThaumometer contexts.
Goggles use original texture and multi-plane layer but still need full ModelGoggles geometry parity.
Wands use original model textures and TC4 constants but still need deeper ModelWand UV/geometry validation.
Infusion Matrix craft path exists, but complete TC4 instability/failure/FX/enchantment and full ConfigRecipes parity remains unfinished.
